---
title: "Meadow_Project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data Loading

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
Artery1 <- read_excel("ArteryPropertiesForMSSP.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1",col_names = FALSE)

Artery2 <- read_excel("ArteryPropertiesForMSSP.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet2",col_names=FALSE)
```

## Transpose columns and rows

```{r}
Artery1<-t(Artery1)
Artery2<-t(Artery2)
first_row <- Artery1[1, ]
Artery1_data <- Artery1[-1, ]
colnames(Artery1_data) <- as.character(first_row)

first_row <- Artery2[1, ]
Artery2_data <- Artery2[-1, ]
colnames(Artery2_data) <- as.character(first_row)
```
      
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

clean_mat <- function(mat) {
  mat %>%
    as_tibble(.name_repair = "minimal") %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ {
      .x %>%
        as.character() %>%
        # 去空格
        str_replace_all("\\s+", "") %>%
        # .xxx → 0.xxx
        str_replace("^\\.", "0.") %>%
        # 转 numeric
        as.numeric()
    })) %>%
    as.matrix()
}
```

```{r}
Artery1_data_1 <- clean_mat(Artery1_data)
Artery2_data_1<- clean_mat(Artery2_data)
```



## EDA

```{r}
summary(Artery1_data)
```
